title: Can't Play Without (CPW)
description: 65 mods crammed together to create the perfect modpack that I simply cannot play without.
body:
# CWP
It's a modpack containing the best and most popular QoL and optimisation mods, shaders, and texture packs. If you have been longing for a modpack that doesn't stray far from Vanilla Minecraft, yet changes the game in such a way that you will never long for regular Minecraft again.

## Some of the important projects included.
### Qol
1. 3D Skin Layers
2. Appleskin
3. Better Advancements
4. Better Statistics Screen
5. BetterF3
6. Chiseled Bookshelf Visualizer
7. Continuity
8. Dark Loading Screen
9. Easy Shulker boxes
10. Fast Quit
11. Freecam
12. Iris Shaders
13. Jade 🔍
14. Mod Menu
15. Status Effect Bars
16. Pick Up Notifier
17. Particle Rain
18. Mouse Tweaks
19. Xaero's Minimap
20. Xaero's World Map
21. Zoomify
22. Axiom
23. Litematica
_and all the configs, API's, and lib mods needed for those_

### Optimisation
1. Sodium
2. Sodium Extras
3. Reese's Sodiium Options
3. Clumps
4. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
4. Cubes Without Borders
2. Chunky
2. Entity Culling
3. Cull Leaves
4. More Culling
5. Ferrite Core
6. ImmediatelyFast
7. Language Reload
8. Lithium

### Shaders
1. BSL Shaders
2. Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
3. Complementary Shaders - Unbound
4. MakeUp - Ultra Fast

### Resource Packs
1. Bare Bones
2. Faithful (32x and 64x)
3. Fresh Animations
4. Fresh Animations - Extensions

# Have fun with it!
